MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-17-2017 Vacated

TDN SWEEP
Off Calendar Dec-08-2016 Set For Trial On Apr-10-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff Bernard Daviss Attendance And Testimony At Deposition; Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-15-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Robert Sprague, of Law Offices of Brian L. Larsen, Tel. 415.398.5000, for plaintiffs, appearing via CourtCall;
Chris Feasel, of Philip M. Andersen & Associates, Tel. 925.225.6838, for defendant, appearing via CourtCall.

Ruling: A R G U E D. DEFENDANT YERY GALLARDO Motion To Compel Plaintiff Bernard Davis' Attendance And Testimony At Deposition is granted. Request for Sanctions are granted in the amount of $1231.60 against plaintiff Bernard Davis. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Robert Kane; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.
